[gold]Transform[/gold] every Attack card in every player's [gold]hand[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Giant Rock+[/gold]|[gold]Giant Rock[/gold]}.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_GENEROUS_DONATION: Choose {IfUpgraded:show:any number of cards|1 card} from your [gold]hand[/gold] and give {IfUpgraded:show:them|it} to a teammate.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_THREE_LEGGED_RACE: Choose another player. You and that player each draw {Cards:diff()} cards. This turn, whenever they gain Energy, you draw that many cards. Whenever you spend Energy, they discard that many cards.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_BURN_THE_MOUNTAIN: For the rest of combat, all cards played by all players are [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. Whenever a player plays another card, add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}card from another character to that player's hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PING_PONG.title: Ping Pong
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PING_PONG.descrip: This turn, whenever another player plays a card that costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, play the visual effect of {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Bouncing Flask+[/gold]|[gold]Bouncing Flask[/gold]} once.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_BEE_BRO_ON_THE_RU: Apply 1 [gold]Personal Hive[/gold] and 10 [gold]Slow[/gold] to all enemies.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_CURSED_HANDKERCHI:
You must play this card before other cards.
Whenever any player completes a set of 7 card plays during a turn, this card costs 1 more this turn and moves to that player's hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_FIND_SOMEONE_TO_G:
{IfUpgraded:show:At the start of your next turn, move this card to your hand.
|}This turn, a teammate gains: whenever they play a card they have already played this turn, add a [gold]Human[/gold] to their hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_HUMAN.title: Human
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_COUPLING.title: Coupling
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_COUPLING.descript: Whenever you [blue]Evoke[/blue] an orb, trigger the passive ability of every remaining orb.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PRESS_FORWARD.des: Upgrade your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]. While [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is in your hand, you must [gold]play[/gold] it before other cards.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_LIKE_SHADOW.title: Like a Shadow
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_LIKE_SHADOW.descr: [gold]Play[/gold] the last card that entered your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_AGITATION.title: Agitation
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_AGITATION.descrip: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. This turn, you can only play cards tied for the highest Energy cost in your hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_VAKUU_TEACHES_U_T: If you play cards from left to right during a turn, [gold]retain[/gold] all your [gold]Block[/gold] and your [gold]hand[/gold] that turn. You may skip cards that cannot be played.
